label: discipline controlled vocabulary
definition: A SKOS ConceptScheme to be used as a controlled vocabulary for the MIDS discipline TODO

label: Biology
definition: Biology is the science of life. It is concerned with the characteristics and behaviors of organisms

label: Geology
definition: Study of the planet earth, its composition, structure, physical and chemical processes, and history since its origin

label: Paleontology
definition: Study of life in past geologic time based on fossil plants and animals
